update_every.title: Update every
update_every.description: Data collection interval, measured in seconds.

autodetection_retry.title: Detection retry
autodetection_retry.description: Recheck interval in seconds. Zero means no recheck will be scheduled.

dsn.title: DSN
dsn.description: Postgres server Data Source Name in [key/value string](https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-connect.html#LIBPQ-CONNSTRING-KEYWORD-VALUE) or [URI](https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-connect.html#LIBPQ-CONNSTRING-URIS) format.

cloud_auth.title: Cloud auth
cloud_auth.description: Optional cloud authentication settings for Azure Database for PostgreSQL.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Cloud auth provider. Use `none` (or leave empty) to disable cloud authentication.

azure_ad.title: Azure AD
azure_ad.description: Microsoft Entra (Azure AD) settings used when provider is `azure_ad`.

tenant_id.title: Tenant ID
tenant_id.description: Azure tenant ID. Required for service_principal mode.

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: Service principal client ID for service_principal mode.

client_secret.title: Client Secret
client_secret.description: Service principal client secret for service_principal mode.

managed_identity_client_id.title: Managed Identity Client ID
managed_identity_client_id.description: Optional client ID of a user-assigned managed identity.

vnode.title: Vnode
vnode.description: Associates this data collection job with a [Virtual Node](https://learn.netdata.cloud/docs/netdata-agent/configuration/organize-systems-metrics-and-alerts#virtual-nodes).

collect_databases_matching.title: Database selector
collect_databases_matching.description: Configuration for monitoring specific databases using [Netdata simple patterns](https://github.com/netdata/netdata/tree/master/src/libnetdata/simple_pattern#readme). If left empty, no database metrics will be collected.

max_db_tables.title: Table limit
max_db_tables.description: Table metrics will not be collected for databases that have more tables than the limit. Set to 0 for no limit.

max_db_indexes.title: Index limit
max_db_indexes.description: Index metrics will not be collected for databases that have more indexes than the limit. Set to 0 for no limit.

transaction_time_histogram.title: Transaction time histogram
transaction_time_histogram.description: Buckets for transaction time histogram in milliseconds.

query_time_histogram.title: Query time histogram
query_time_histogram.description: Buckets for query time histogram in milliseconds.

functions.title: Functions
functions.description: Configuration for Netdata functions exposed by this collector.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Query timeout in seconds. Set to 0 to use the collector's timeout.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of queries to return. Set to 0 to use the default (500).

vnode.ui:placeholder: To use this option, first create a Virtual Node and then reference its name here.

autodetection_retry.ui:help: This option determines how frequently (in seconds) Netdata will retry data collection jobs that failed initially, with the value of 60 meaning it retries to start data collection jobs every 60 seconds, while setting it to 0 disables this retry mechanism entirely.

disabled.ui:help: WARNING: Query text may contain unmasked sensitive literals (PII). Requires pg_stat_statements extension.
